title: Better search capabilities with subitem connected board
excerpt:

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
When connecting subitems to another board it present the name of the sub items with a small header of the parent item’s name.
Unfortunately when manually connecting, you can only search by the sub item names and not by the parent name.

Adding this small feature will help tremendously.

image696×554 27.5 KB

image700×559 27.9 KB

image686×529 20.4 KB

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Nice suggestion! So 2 search boxes? “Search by Parent Item” and “Search or add Sub-item”

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml: I think using the same search box makes more sense
